# OnPoint — Agent Commerce

> Fit-aware fashion supply graph. Same catalog for humans and agents.
> Try on real inventory with AI, then pay with cUSD or gasless USDC on Celo.

## Base URL
api: https://api.onpoint.famile.xyz
web: https://beonpoint.netlify.app
manifest: /.well-known/agent.json
guide: https://github.com/thisyearnofear/onpoint/blob/master/AGENTS.md

## What you can do
- Browse curators and storefronts (free, no auth)
- Try on items before buying ($0.03 digital, $0.05 physical, cUSD)
- Buy physical items from curator storefronts (cUSD on Celo)
- Mint fashion NFTs with 0xSplits royalties ($0.10)
- All payments via x402 (HTTP 402 challenge) or x402 facilitator (gasless USDC)

## Quick start
1. GET /api/curator/directory?agentPurchasable=1
2. GET /api/curator/{slug}/storefront (includes webUrl: /s/{slug})
3. POST /api/agent/try-on (optional, 402 -> pay -> re-POST with txHash -> 200 with polaroid.webUrl)
4. POST /api/curator/{slug}/order (402 -> pay -> re-POST with txHash -> 201 with storefrontUrl)
5. GET /api/curator/{slug}/earnings (public ledger)

## Viral loop
- try-on returns polaroid.webUrl -> shareable branded page with fit score + on-chain proof
- order returns receiptUrl -> branded receipt page with payment + payout proof
- 402 responses include revenueHint -> shows curator share, platform fee, agent markup note
- storefront + order responses include webUrl -> human-browsable links agents can share
- polaroid page has OG meta tags -> social shares render OnPoint-branded cards

## Reference implementation
buyer-script: https://github.com/thisyearnofear/onpoint/blob/master/scripts/agent-buyer.mjs

## Chain
chain: Celo (42220)
token: cUSD / USDC
facilitator: https://api.x402.celo.org (EIP-3009, gasless)
attribution: ERC-8021 (append dataSuffix from 402 response to payment tx data)
